sentences.target: Je ne mange pas de viande.
sentences.grammar_note: Negative construction with partitive (de); feminine singular
Partitive article (de la) with feminine singular noun

sentences.target: La viande de ce magasin est fraîche.
sentences.translation: The meat from this store is fresh.
sentences.grammar_note: Possessive construction (de ce magasin); predicate adjective (fraîche)
Present tense verb (aimes); compound adjective (viande rouge)

sentences.target: J'ai acheté de la viande hier.
sentences.grammar_note: Passé composé with avoir; partitive article (de la)

sentences.target: La viande que tu as cuisinée était délicieuse.
sentences.translation: The meat that you cooked was delicious.
sentences.grammar_note: Relative clause (que); passé composé past participle (cuisinée, feminine agreement)

sentences.target: Nous avons mangé trop de viande au dîner.
sentences.translation: We ate too much meat at dinner.
sentences.grammar_note: Passé composé, 1st person plural; adverb (trop); preposition (au = à le)

sentences.target: La viande rouge est riche en protéines.
sentences.translation: Red meat is rich in protein.

sentences.target: Cette viande vient d'une ferme locale.
sentences.translation: This meat comes from a local farm.
sentences.grammar_note: Demonstrative adjective (cette); present tense verb (vient); prepositional phrase (d'une ferme)
